betOfDay.analysis: Rockets are one of the hottest teams in the league, 11-4 in their last 15. Getting them at home -2 is solid value. Heat struggling on the road.

picks.reasoning: Cavs one of the best teams in the East. Road game but -4.5 is reasonable value. Pelicans struggling.
Rockets red hot, best record in West. Home court advantage key. Heat inconsistent on road.
Lakers are the better team, getting 3 points on the road is value. Magic inconsistent at home.

research.nba: 10 NBA games today (March 21). Best values: Cavs -4.5, Rockets -2, Lakers +3. Avoid: OKC -21.5, MEM -16.5 (lines too steep).
